optionA.text: Cephalic veil marginally smooth, scaphe not distinctly separated from abdomen

optionB.text: Cephalic veil marginally cirrate; scaphe distinctly set off from abdomen

optionA.text: Twelve uncinigers, cephalic veil at least partly fused to the operculum

optionB.text: Thirteen uncinigers, cephalic veil completely free from the operculum

optionA.text: Uncini with major teeth in a single row

optionB.text: Uncini with major teeth in two rows
